subcodes.first_line: The Pen of God hath, in most moments, occupied itself with the remembrance of His friends—those souls who have hearkened unto the Divine Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم الهی در اکثری از احیان بذکر دوستان مشغول یعنی آن نفوسیکه ندای الهی را
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @goodly deeds; actions, @high station of the true believer, @love of God
